lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohi man leenaa |
lines.english: The mind is engrossed in sexual desire, anger, greed and emotional attachment.
Breaking my bonds, the Guru has liberated me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਕਰਤ ਜਨਮਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਮੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh karat janam fun mooaa |
lines.english: Experiencing pain and pleasure, one is born, only to die again.
The Lotus Feet of the Guru bring peace and shelter. ||3||
The world is drowning in the ocean of fire.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਰਪਉ ਸਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan man dhan arpau sabh apanaa |
lines.english: Body, mind, wealth and everything, I surrender to my Lord.
O Nanak, holding me by the arm, the True Guru has saved me. ||4||3||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਮਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kavan su mat jit har har japanaa |1|
lines.english: What is that wisdom, by which I may come to chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har? ||1||
Nurturing hope, I have come to beg from God.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, this mind is saved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑ ਪੇਖਤ ਸੋਭਾ ਮੇਰੈ ਆਗਨਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tuma pekhat sobhaa merai aagan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Gazing upon You, the courtyard of my heart is embellished. ||1||Pause||
Trying several methods, I reflect deeply upon the Lord.
I have neither intelligence, wisdom, common sense nor cleverness.
I meet You, only if You lead me to meet You. ||3||
My eyes are content, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan.
Says Nanak, such a life is fruitful and rewarding. ||4||4||9||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa sut saath na maaeaa |
lines.english: Mother, father, children and the wealth of Maya, will not go along with you.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, all pain is dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jap rasanaa dukh na viaape |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord with your tongue, and pain will not afflict you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: rav rahiaa prabh sabh meh aape |
lines.english: God Himself is pervading, and permeating all.
One who is afflicted by the terrible fire of thirst and desire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲ ਭਏ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਜਾਪਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: seetal bhe har har jas jaapiaa |2|
lines.english: becomes cool, chanting the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||2||
By millions of efforts, peace is not obtained;
Please bless me with devotion, O God, O Searcher of hearts.
the mind is satisfied only by singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||
By great good fortune, the Perfect Guru is found.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
This is Nanak's prayer, O Lord and Master. ||4||5||10||
O Supreme Lord God, I seek Your Sanctuary.
Meeting with the Holy Saints, meditate on the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟੈ ਭਜੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kilabikh kaattai bhaj gur ke charanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Guru's Feet, sinful mistakes are erased. ||1||Pause||
joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, one is saved. ||2||
All other rituals are just worldly affairs;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau prabh kirapaa kareeai |
lines.english: Have Mercy upon servant Nanak, O God,
but only by chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is one saved and carried across. ||3||
One may contemplate the Simritees, Shaastras and Vedas,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਿਦੇ ਮਹਿ ਚੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad ride meh cheenaa |
lines.english: I contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad within my heart;
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
and bless him with the dust of the feet of the Holy, that he may be emancipated. ||4||6||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apunaa naam deenaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: the Lord has mercifully blessed them with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਾ ਮੁਖੁ ਊਜਲੁ ਕੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kaa mukh aoojal keenaa |
lines.english: The faces of the humble Saints are radiant and bright;
all my hopes and desires are fulfilled. ||1||
and their victory is celebrated throughout the world. ||2||
He elevates and exalts the lowly, and fills the empty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਤੇ ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop te kar geh leenaa |
lines.english: Holding them by the hand, He has lifted them up out of the deep, dark pit,
They receive the supreme, sublime essence of the Ambrosial Naam. ||3||
Says Nanak, God is pleased with me. ||4||7||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪਾਪ ਜਲਿ ਖੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal paap jal kheenaa |
lines.english: The mind and body are made immaculate and pure, and sins are burnt to ashes.
All desires are fulfilled, O my friend,
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
